if.test: userId != null and userId != '' and authGrpId != null and authGrpId != ''

sql.if: LEFT JOIN xeus.mt_auth_list AS authlist ON evetlist.evt_typ_cd = authlist.auth_data JOIN xeus.mt_auth_join AS authjoin ON authlist.auth_mgr_no = authjoin.auth_mgr_no AND (authjoin.auth_grp_no = #{userId} or authjoin.auth_grp_no = #{authGrpId})

if.test: userId != null and userId != '' and authGrpId != null and authGrpId != ''

sql.if: LEFT JOIN xeus.mt_auth_list AS authlist ON hist.evt_typ_cd = authlist.auth_data JOIN xeus.mt_auth_join AS authjoin ON authlist.auth_mgr_no = authjoin.auth_mgr_no AND (authjoin.auth_grp_no = #{userId} or authjoin.auth_grp_no = #{authGrpId})
